name: Critical Metals Corp.
description: Critical Metals Corp. is a leading strategic mining company focused on the development and production of critical metals essential for the green energy transition and global supply chain security. The company's flagship asset is the Wolfsberg Lithium Project in Austria, which is poised to become the first major source of battery-grade lithium in Europe. By securing high-quality resources and implementing sustainable mining practices, Critical Metals Corp. aims to support the growing demand for electric vehicle batteries and renewable energy storage solutions while reducing dependence on external supply chains.
